  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

TCU_ROBD_V2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7CA
Recv ID: 7DA
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 77
Func Name: DCM Renault

Auto IDents

      },

        "bitoffset": 5
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
